name: Saltimbocca Alla Romana
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound veal cutlets to flatten them. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Lay 1 sage leaf on each piece of veal and top with 1/2 slice prosciutto.
3. Pin the cutlets together with toothpicks.
4. Melt butter with oil in a large skillet.
5. Lightly flour the veal bundles and sauté over medium heat for 2 minutes per side (in two batches, if necessary).
6. Transfer the veal to a heated dish and remove the toothpicks.
7. Pour white wine into the skillet.
8. Over high heat, quickly stir and scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
9. Pour the sauce over the veal, squeeze in lemon juice, and serve immediately.
